---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Propose a new physics module, solver improvement, or infrastructure enhancement for GRANITE
labels: enhancement
---

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Before submitting:** Please verify that this feature aligns with the GRANITE Roadmap and has not been proposed in a previous issue. 

## 📝 Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what should GRANITE be able to do that it currently cannot? -->

## 🔬 Physics & Scientific Motivation

<!-- Why does this feature matter for numerical relativity or GRMHD simulations?
     Is there a reference paper that describes the method you are proposing?
     If applicable, cite the equations or core algorithm. -->

## 🛠️ Proposed Implementation Approach

<!-- (Optional) If you have a specific architectural approach in mind, describe it here.
     - Which source file(s) would change? (e.g. `src/radiation/m1.cpp`)
     - What public API would be added? (e.g. a new method on `CCZ4Evolution`)
     - What unit or integration test would validate it? -->

## ⚖️ Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches were considered, and why is this one preferred? -->

## ⏱️ Priority & Impact

<!-- How does this relate to the GRANITE roadmap?
     - Is this blocking a specific benchmark or production run?
     - Is this a v0.7 / v0.8 / v1.0 scope item? -->

## 🧩 Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, links to academic papers, or diagrams that help explain the request. -->
